session.user:
Run all three checks and report results:
1. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py 3. pytest tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py -x -v
session.assistant: I'll run all three checks for you. Let me execute them now.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py
Check for linting violations with ruff

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py
Check code formatting with ruff format

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest tests for pr dispatch and remote paths

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 32 items
tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py .......................... [ 81%] tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py ...... [100%]
============================== 32 passed in 0.83s ==============================
session.assistant:
Excellent! All three checks passed:
**1. ruff check** - Passed - No linting violations found in either file
**2. ruff format --check** - Passed - Both files are already properly formatted
**3. pytest** - Passed - 32 tests passed in 0.83s across both test modules: - 26 tests in `tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py` - 6 tests in `tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py`
All code quality and test requirements are satisfied.
